name: Cognizant Technology Solutions
headquarters: Teaneck, New Jersey, USA (India HQ: Chennai)
description: Cognizant is a leading provider of information technology, consulting, and business process services. Cognizant helps clients transform and thrive in a changing world by combining deep industry knowledge and expertise in areas like digital, cloud, data, and AI with a full range of business and technology services.

overview.tagline: Accelerating clients' transition to a new world of work
highlights: One of the largest IT companies globally
GenC hiring program for fresh graduates
Strong presence in Banking & Healthcare IT

eligibility.backlogs: No active backlogs (no rounding of percentage e.g. 59.9% not allowed)
eligibility.note: Certain specialized branches (Leather, Fashion, Food Technology) may be excluded. Indian nationals, OCIs, and PIOs eligible.

recruitmentPattern.source: Based on PrepInsta, GeeksforGeeks and candidate experience reports

roles.title: GenC (Programmer Analyst Trainee)
roles.description: Standard entry-level role for fresh graduates

roles.title: GenC Elevate
roles.description: Higher package role for candidates with better coding score

roles.title: GenC Pro
roles.description: Premium role for exceptional coders and top performers

rounds.name: Communication Assessment
rounds.description: AI-based online test evaluating grammar, vocabulary, listening, reading, and speaking skills. This is an ELIMINATION round.

rounds.name: Aptitude Assessment
rounds.description: Quantitative aptitude and game-based cognitive aptitude test.

rounds.name: Technical Assessment
rounds.description: Comprehensive technical test with coding, SQL, Cloud, and Web scenarios.

rounds.name: Technical & HR Interview
rounds.description: Combined Technical and HR interview. May be conducted in-person or virtually.

rounds.name: GenAI & Prompt Engineering Assessment
rounds.description: Evaluation of GenAI fundamentals, prompt optimization, RAG pipelines, and enterprise security (prompt injection).

recruitmentPattern.negativeMark: No negative marking in any assessment round
tips: Communication round is first — practice speaking English fluently
Game-based aptitude is different from traditional reasoning — try mock games online
SQL is tested practically — practice writing actual SQL queries
Cloud Fundamentals (AWS/Azure basics) are important — do a basic course
For GenC Pro, solve 100+ LeetCode problems
Prepare 2-3 strong projects with full technical knowledge
commonMistakes: Underestimating communication assessment (it's an elimination round)

tips: Be ready to write code on paper/whiteboard
Be prepared to design a RAG pipeline or explain how to prevent prompt injection vulnerabilities.
